definitions.text: A person who has not yet reached adulthood, whether natural (puberty), cultural (initiation), or legal (majority).
examples: Go easy on him: he is but a child.
Regular chores can be appropriate for children, given age-appropriate limits on difficulty level and time on task.

definitions.text: A youth aged 1 to 9 years, whereas neonates are aged 0 to 1 month, infants are aged 1 to 12 months, and adolescents are aged 10 to 20 years.
To give birth; to beget or procreate.
